text: installation recent package version additional repository added R: additional repository can made available permanently adding line file called .Rprofile stored home folder system (Sys.glob("~") R returns home directory). recent version package can installed using install.packages: Package updates can installed using update.packages (make sure additional repository added running command):

title: calcCluster — calcCluster
text: function calculates aggregation mapping given cluster methodology

title: calcCluster — calcCluster
code: calcCluster(   ctype,   regionscode = madrat::regionscode(),   seed = 42,   weight = NULL,   lpjml = c(natveg = "LPJmL4", crop = "LPJmL5"),   clusterdata = "yield_airrig" )

title: calcCluster — calcCluster
text: ctype aggregation clustering type, combination single letter, indicating cluster methodology, number, indicating number resulting clusters. Available methodologies hierarchical clustering (h), normalized k-means clustering (n), combined hierarchical/normalized k-means clustering (c) manual setting clusters per region (m). combined clustering hierarchical clustering used determine cluster distribution among regions whereasit manually set m type. use normalized k-means clustering within region. regionscode regionscode regional mapping used. Must agree regionscode mapping mentioned madrat config! Can retrieved via regionscode(). seed Seed Random Number Generation. set NULL chosen automatically, set integer always return pseudo-random numbers (useful get identical clusters identical inputs n c clustering) weight specific regions resolved less detail? Values > 1 mean higher share, < 1 lower share e.g. cfg$cluster_weight <- c(LAM=2) means higher level detail region LAM set NULL weights assumed 1 (examples: c(LAM=1.5,SSA=1.5,OAS=1.5), c(LAM=2,SSA=2,OAS=2)) lpjml defines LPJmL version crop/grass natveg specific inputs clusterdata similarity data used determine clusters: yield_airrig (current default) yield_increment

text: map cells clusters data.frame

text: Jan Philipp Dietrich

title: calcClusterHierarchical — calcClusterHierarchical
text: Performs MAgPIE hierarchical clustering calculates corresponding spam              relation matrix creation clustering tree time consuming function checks first input folder corresponding data already exists stores tree information input folder later use next execution function.

title: calcClusterHierarchical — calcClusterHierarchical
code: calcClusterHierarchical(   regionscode,   ncluster,   lpjml = c(natveg = "LPJmL4", crop = "LPJmL5"),   clusterdata = "yield_airrig",   mode = "h",   weight = NULL )

title: calcClusterHierarchical — calcClusterHierarchical
text: regionscode regionscode regional mapping used. Must agree regionscode mapping mentioned madrat config! Can retrieved via regionscode(). ncluster desired total number clusters. lpjml defines LPJmL version crop/grass natveg specific inputs clusterdata similarity data used determine clusters: yield_airrig (current default) yield_increment mode Clustering type. moment can choose complete linkage clustering (h), single linkage clustering (s) Ward clustering (w). weight named vector weighting factors region cluster distribution, e.g. weight=c(AFR=3,EUR=0.5). weight > 1 grant cluster region weight < 1 less cluster default.

title: calcClusterHierarchical — calcClusterHierarchical
text: mapping regions clusters

title: calcClusterHierarchical — calcClusterHierarchical
text: Jan Philipp Dietrich

title: calcClusterKMeans — calcClusterKMeans
text: regionscode regionscode regional mapping used. Must agree regionscode mapping mentioned madrat config! Can retrieved via regionscode(). ncluster desired total number clusters. weight named vector weighting factors region cluster distribution, e.g. weight=c(AFR=3,EUR=0.5). weight > 1 grant cluster region weight < 1 less cluster default. cpr cells-per-region information returned toolClusterPerRegionManual. Weight ncluster ignored case cpr provided! seed single value, interpreted integer, NULL, define seed random calculations lpjml defines LPJmL version crop/grass natveg specific inputs clusterdata similarity data used determine clusters: yield_airrig (current default) yield_increment

title: calcEFRSmakthin — calcEFRSmakthin
text: function calculates environmental flow requirements (EFR) MAgPIE              retrieved LPJmL monthly discharge water availability using              method Smakthin et al. (2004)

title: calcEFRSmakthin — calcEFRSmakthin
code: calcEFRSmakthin(   lpjml = c(natveg = "LPJmL4_for_MAgPIE_44ac93de", crop =     "ggcmi_phase3_nchecks_9ca735cb"),   climatetype = "GSWP3-W5E5:historical",   stage = "harmonized2020",   LFR_val = 0.1,   HFR_LFR_less10 = 0.2,   HFR_LFR_10_20 = 0.15,   HFR_LFR_20_30 = 0.07,   HFR_LFR_more30 = 0,   seasonality = "grper",   cells = "lpjcell" )

title: calcEFRSmakthin — calcEFRSmakthin
text: lpjml Defines LPJmL version crop/grass natveg specific inputs climatetype Switch different climate scenarios stage Degree processing: raw, smoothed, harmonized, harmonized2020 LFR_val Strictness environmental flow requirements HFR_LFR_less10 High flow requirements (share total water cells) LFR<10percent total water HFR_LFR_10_20 High flow requirements (share total water cells) 10percent < LFR < 20percent total water HFR_LFR_20_30 High flow requirements (share total water cells) 20percent < LFR < 30percent total water HFR_LFR_more30 High flow requirements (share total water cells) LFR>30percent total water seasonality grper (default): EFR growing period per year; total: EFR throughout year; monthly: monthly EFRs cells lpjcell 67420 cells magpiecell 59199 cells

title: calcGridPop — calcGridPop
text: Past future (SSP1-5) population based HYDE3.2 Jones & O'Neill (2016) Data scaled match WDI data calcPopulation NOTE scaling factors future (small countries Gambia Djibouti) , data read 50

title: calcGridPop — calcGridPop
code: calcGridPop(   source = "ISIMIP",   subtype = "all",   cellular = TRUE,   cells = "lpjcell",   FiveYear = TRUE,   scale = TRUE,   harmonize_until = 2015,   urban = FALSE )

title: calcGridPop — calcGridPop
text: source default source (ISIMIP) Gao data (readGridPopGao) split urban rural. subtype time horizon returned. Options: past (1965-2005), future (2005-2010) (divergence starts year harmonize_until) cellular true: half degree grid cell data returned cells number halfdegree grid cells returned. Options: "magpiecell" (59199), "lpjcell" (67420) FiveYear TRUE 5 year time steps, otherwise yearly source scale true: scales sum gridded values match country level totals harmonize_until harmonization year SSPs diverge (default: 2015) urban TRUE return urban gridded population based iso share

title: fullCELLULARMAGPIE — fullCELLULARMAGPIE
text: Function produces complete cellular data set required              running MAgPIE model.

title: fullCELLULARMAGPIE — fullCELLULARMAGPIE
code: fullCELLULARMAGPIE(   rev = numeric_version("0.1"),   dev = "",   ctype = "c200",   climatetype = "MRI-ESM2-0:ssp370",   lpjml = c(natveg = "LPJmL4_for_MAgPIE_44ac93de", crop =     "ggcmi_phase3_nchecks_9ca735cb", grass = "lpjml5p2_pasture"),   isimip = NULL,   clusterweight = NULL,   emu_id = NULL )

title: fullCELLULARMAGPIE — fullCELLULARMAGPIE
text: rev data revision used input (numeric_version). dev development suffix distinguish development versions data revision. can useful distinguish parallel lines development. ctype aggregation clustering type, combination single letter, indicating cluster methodology, number, indicating number resulting clusters. Available methodologies - hierarchical clustering (h), - normalized k-means clustering (n) - combined hierarchical/normalized k-means clustering (c). latter hierarchical clustering used determine cluster distribution among regions whereas normalized k-means used clustering within region. climatetype Global Circulation Model used lpjml Defines LPJmL version crop/grass natveg specific inputs isimip Defines isimip crop model input replace maiz, tece, rice_pro soybean clusterweight specific regions resolved less detail?                      Values > 1 mean higher share, < 1 lower share                      e.g. cfg$clusterweight <- c(LAM=2) means                      higher level detail region LAM set NULL                      weights assumed 1. Examples:                      c(LAM=1.5,SSA=1.5,OAS=1.5) c(LAM=2,SSA=2,OAS=2) setConfig (e.g. setting mainfolder already set properly). emu_id Pasture Soil carbon emulator ID

title: fullCELLULARMAGPIE — fullCELLULARMAGPIE
text: Kristine Karstens, Jan Philipp Dietrich
